summary: Set 070 Session 3 of 3 (FINAL) -- synthesis + docs + release + dogfood + close. Ran on claude-opus-4-8. SET 070 IS NOW FULLY DELIVERED. DELIVERED THIS SESSION: (1) SYNTHESIS DOCS -- docs/verification-surface-strategy.md S5.1 updated (the three operator-directive commitments are now BUILT) + new S5.2 recording the steelman-push upgrade, the dual-surface instrument, the fair-shake scoring, the recorded dualSurfaceMode, and the HONEST telemetry status (instrument built + dogfooded, but NO powered benchmark datapoint yet -- the seeded+holdout benchmark is unpopulated, so score_against_benchmark is INCONCLUSIVE by construction; powered telemetry awaits the downstream consumer-repo field pilots; RETIRE stays closed); S3's targeted-layer bullet notes push now runs at strong adversarial framing. ai_router/docs/pull-verifier.md gained a 'What Set 070 added' section. (2) LESSON -- L-064-7 refined with the Set 070 S2 symmetric failure (a substantive re-verify pinned max_tier=2 -> dropped to a same-provider tier-2 model + a 529; a substantive re-verify must stay on the R1 verifier's tier). No new lesson minted. EATEN THIS SESSION: every cross-provider re-verify (R1-R6) stayed on the gpt-5-4 tier with NO max_tier pin. (3) RELEASE -- ai_router version bumped 0.23.0 -> 0.24.0 (pyproject.toml + ai_router/__init__.__version__, which agree). The PyPI publish is OPERATOR-GATED and runs POST-CLOSE (operator pushes tag v0.24.0 on the green-Test SHA; tag commit == fixed SHA, the Set 068 lesson; the publish run id is recorded after). (4) NEXT-SET RECOMMENDATION routed (s3-next-session-set.md): Set 071 telemetry-readiness + latent-bug hardening (canonical repo), with the consumer-repo field pilots as the powered-telemetry source. (5) change-log.md. (6) DOGFOOD -- pathAwareCritique:required + contractGate:advisory, AND the headline: the new dual-surface mode run over this set's own diff (dualSurfaceMode:opt-in recorded; dual-surface-comparison.json). DOGFOOD HEADLINE (the value): the END-OF-SET PATH-AWARE CRITIQUE (iterative, multi-provider) caught FIVE real defects the S2/S3 per-session routed verification + the cross-provider R1 all MISSED, each fixed with a regression: (a) MAJOR equal-arms scoring guard -- score_comparison/score_against_benchmark ignored the attestation, so an inspection-only require_equal=False artifact (explicitly 'never RETIRE evidence') could be scored as valid telemetry -> added _arms_held_equal; (b) MAJOR surfaces-consistency -- MergedFinding.surfaces could emit a duplicate label and the validator never checked surfaces vs contributors -> producer emits distinct surfaces, validator + schema(uniqueItems) reject dups/inconsistency; (c) MAJOR schema<->validator parity -- the schema accepted provenanceComplete=true with a nonzero unkeyed count -> if/then encodes it; then the R4 verifier caught that the parity was STILL incomplete (the schema CAN express 'no unkeyed finding' via not/contains -- my 'runtime-only' adjudication was wrong) -> extended the if/then; (d) MEDIUM the equal-arms guard initially TRUSTED the self-asserted *Equal booleans (R3) -> rewritten to RE-DERIVE equality from the raw per-arm identities ('measured not assumed'); then (e) the R4 verifier caught it was OVER-STRICT (required a match to the REQUESTED provider/model) -> relaxed to judge ACTUAL arm equality (push==pull) only, requested* provenance-only. +16 net-new tests (10 equal-arms-guard incl a 'lying booleans caught by raw re-derivation' case + 3 surfaces-consistency + 3 schema<->validator parity). ADJUDICATIONS (NOT fixed, recorded with rationale): (i) a path-aware finding that record_dual_surface_mode is mutable = FALSE POSITIVE (record_* is the low-level always-append sanctioned writer; immutability lives in resolve_and_record_dual_surface_mode, exactly the path_aware_critique/verification_mode sibling layering); (ii) the dual-surface-comparison.json dogfood artifact's six push findings are MALFORMED-PARSE fallout (the push arm, gemini-2.5-pro single-shot over the ~5.7k-line diff, emitted markdown that parse_verification_response parsed into empty-severity findings) -- this is a property of the DOGFOOD RUN not the shipping code (merge/score/validate are correct; the re-deriving guard + provenanceComplete=false keep it honest); it is prominently caveated in change-log ('Dogfood-artifact caveat'), presented as a MECHANISM DEMONSTRATION not a meaningful-findings datapoint, and a push-arm PARSE-QUALITY GUARD is recorded as a DEFERRED RESIDUAL for the next set (L-069-1 scope-and-record) rather than bolted on in close-out; artifacts never edited after writing (L-064-3). PATH-AWARE CRITIQUE LINEAGE: run iteratively as the end-of-set dogfood; the committed path-aware-critique.json is the final round (the gate artifact, a valid >=2-provider artifact); path-aware-critique-prefix-dogfood.json preserves round 1 (which caught the equal-arms defect). It is a DIFFERENT verification surface from the per-session cross-provider gate and need not post-date the cross-provider fixes. VERIFICATION (cross-provider, gpt-5-4, routed_gate REQUIRED: blast-radius+multi-module+breadth+build-ci-config via the pyproject bump; up-front conventions blocks per L-064-10; strong devil's-advocate framing): SIX rounds. R1 ISSUES x3 (release/status tense overclaim + 'byte-for-byte unchanged' overclaim + dogfood-claimed-but-not-run) -> tense/scope fixed + dogfood actually run. R2 ISSUES x2 (path-aware gate artifact captured pre-fix; change-log footer stale + stray </content></invoke> markup) -> re-ran critique + preserved prefix evidence + fixed footer. R3 ISSUES x2 MAJOR (path-aware staleness recurrence -> reframed as iterative dogfood; equal-arms guard trusted booleans -> re-derive from raw). R4 ISSUES x2 (equal-arms over-strict on requested id -> actual-arm equality; schema parity incomplete for unkeyed findings -> extended if/then). R5 ISSUES x1 MINOR (guard docstring + change-log still described consulting requested* -> corrected to actual-arm-only). R6 VERIFIED. SUITE: full ai_router GREEN 2079 passed / 5 skipped (S2 baseline 2063 + 16 net-new; the 5 skips are the Set 069 S4 real-podman-on-Windows by-design skips). Metered spend this session ~ R1 0.136 + R2 0.244 + R3 0.256 + R4 0.247 + R5 0.250 + R6 0.305 + next-set route + 4 path-aware critique runs + 1 dual-surface dogfood ~= a few dollars (release-bearing final session with dogfood-driven hardening). Session 3 VERIFIED. NO behavioral regression: the dual-surface mode is additive (absent a recorded dualSurfaceMode, route/pull_route/produce_path_aware_critique are byte-for-byte unchanged); the one intended behavioral change is verification.md's strong-adversarial framing (the steelman-push deliverable, S1).

reason.specifics: This is the FINAL session of Set 070; the set closes here, so there is no next session of THIS set. The next-SESSION-SET recommendation was produced via routed analysis (s3-next-session-set.md): Set 071 telemetry-readiness + latent-bug hardening in the CANONICAL repo (build the benchmark-population apparatus so the dual-surface mode becomes conclusive, and resolve the L-069-1 deferred residual in path_aware_critique.py / dedicated_verification.py), with the consumer-repo field pilots as the powered-telemetry source. The orchestrator named here mirrors S1-S2 (opus-4-8) only as a default carry-forward; the operator chooses the next set and its orchestrator, and a non-anthropic engine is defensible for fresh eyes.
